message:
feat: wire --files flag in formula run command

The formula spec accepts a files parameter but the CLI flag was not
wired. Added --files flag to formulaRunCmd that passes file paths to
both execution paths (single-leg and multi-leg) as {{.files}} in templates.

Cherry-picked from PR #2488.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
